$schema.description: Local editor-only schema reference for the JSONC config file.

allowDelete.description: Runtime delete-admission gate for compression_mark and allowDelete-aware reminder wording.

promptPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to the compaction prompt asset.

leadingUserPromptPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to the synthetic user prompt injected at the start of every projection.

compactionModels.description: Ordered compaction model chain used for retry/fallback.

markedTokenAutoCompactionThreshold.description: Marked-token readiness threshold for auto compaction.

smallUserMessageThreshold.description: Protection threshold for short user messages in projection.

schedulerMarkThreshold.description: Internal/test compatibility threshold that still works by mark count, distinct from markedTokenAutoCompactionThreshold.

runtimeLogPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute runtime event log path.

seamLogPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute seam observation log path.

debugSnapshotPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute debug snapshot directory path for messages.transform input/output snapshots.

promptPaths.description: Plain-text reminder prompt asset paths keyed by severity × allowDelete.

reminderPromptVariant.description: Reminder prompt text paths for one allowDelete branch. These assets are plain text, not templates.
